prs.title: Update sync-service.ts
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Single-line change to one file is a trivial fix or tweak.

prs.title: Fix domain sanitization for company creation
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Meaningful domain sanitization fix spanning 8 files including utils, HubSpot config/types/sync-service, admin actions, and unit tests with 271 custom lines.

prs.title: HubSpot Sync Improvements: Smart Updates, Stop Control, and One-Mode Testing
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Significant feature set adding smart update logic, stop control API endpoint, UI controls, schema changes, and middleware updates across 7 files with 524 custom lines.

prs.title: Add HubSpot ID verification to prevent orphaned references
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Major reliability feature adding HubSpot ID verification to prevent orphaned references, touching schema, API routes, UI, sync service, and middleware across 7 files with 483 custom lines.

prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small performance optimization across 3 files with 26 lines, primarily config and targeted sync-service tweaks.

prs.author: Jason

prs.title: Release: January 28, 2026 - HubSpot Integration, Notes System & Portfolio Analytics
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Transformative release PR with 11,399 lines across 104 files introducing HubSpot integration, a notes system, portfolio analytics, and AI agent enhancements representing weeks of parallel work from two contributors.

prs.title: portfolio data table
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Significant UI feature delivering a portfolio data table with filtering/popover UI components, DAL updates, and multiple new reusable UI primitives across 9 files with 1,411 custom lines.

prs.title: HubSpot Integration with Sync History Tracking
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Major feature introducing the full HubSpot integration with bidirectional sync, sync history tracking, admin UI, API routes, schema changes, scripts, and extensive documentation across 26 files with 5,002 custom lines.

prs.title: SM-313: Removes gap assessment button
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Trivial UI removal of a gap assessment button across 2 files with 0 net custom additions.

prs.title: SM-331: Stores BullMQ job progress
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Solid feature adding BullMQ job progress storage with schema changes, notes entrypoint updates, progress library, and unit tests across 7 files with 450 custom lines.

prs.title: AI portfolio agent
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Significant AI feature introducing a new portfolio sub-agent with its own graph, state, tools, and index, plus integration wiring into the main chat agent across 22 files with 809 custom lines.

prs.title: SM-314: Notes & Refactor
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Major feature introducing the full notes system (AI notes agent, entrypoint, prompts, S3 service, DAL, UI components) alongside broad app refactoring across 34 files with 2,139 custom lines.

prs.title: Release: January 26, 2026 - AI Improvements & Document Generation Refactoring
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: A major release PR spanning 33 files and 1082 custom lines covering AI agent refactoring, sub-agent improvements, new document generation flows, prompt engineering, and infrastructure config changes, representing significant architectural work across the AI layer.

stories.name: HubSpot Integration & Sync Engine
stories.rationale: Built and progressively refined a full HubSpot integration with sync history tracking, domain normalization, smart update logic, orphan prevention, performance optimizations, and dry-run support.

stories.name: Notes System & Core Refactoring
stories.rationale: Introduced a company notes system alongside a broader code refactor to improve platform maintainability and data organization.

stories.name: Portfolio Analytics & Data Table
stories.rationale: Delivered an AI-powered portfolio agent and an interactive portfolio data table, enabling users to analyze and visualize portfolio performance.

stories.name: Background Job Progress Tracking
stories.rationale: Added BullMQ job progress storage to give the platform visibility into the state and completion of background processing tasks.

stories.name: Remove Gap Assessment Entry Point
stories.rationale: Removed the gap assessment button from the UI as part of a product decision to streamline the user experience.

stories.name: January 28 Platform Release
stories.rationale: Consolidated release bundling HubSpot integration, the notes system, and portfolio analytics into a versioned production deployment.

stories.name: January 26 AI & Document Generation Release
stories.rationale: Shipped improvements to AI capabilities and refactored the document generation pipeline in a versioned release.
